name: ExtensionTask_Performer
title: R5: Who or what performed the task (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Task.performer` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Task.performer` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Task.performer` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Task.performer` has a context of Task based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Task`.
Element `Task.performer` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
